full_text:
Cang Ci (Xiaoren) 倉慈 (孝仁)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cang Ci (倉慈), styledXiaoren (孝仁), was born in Jiujiang. Governor of Dunhuang, his handling of foreign affairs gave him a great reputation. Cang Ci was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
